title: Ant Control in Jericho, Long Island | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional ant control services in Jericho, Long Island. Expert ant extermination for homes and businesses. Prices from $350-$550. Same-day service available.
intro: Dealing with an ant infestation in your Jericho home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive ant control solutions tailored to Long Island's unique pest challenges. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate carpenter ants, pavement ants, and odorous house ants common in the Jericho area.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving Long Island communities, we understand Jericho's specific ant problems from the historic estates near Jericho Turnpike to modern residential developments. Our licensed exterminators provide guaranteed results with eco-friendly treatment options that keep your family and pets safe.
localContext: Jericho's mix of older colonial homes and newer constructions creates ideal conditions for ant colonies seeking shelter and food sources. Properties near wooded areas around Cantiague Park and the Jericho Preserve are particularly susceptible to carpenter ant invasions during spring and summer months.

faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Jericho?
faqs.answer: Jericho homeowners typically encounter carpenter ants, pavement ants, and odorous house ants. Carpenter ants are especially problematic in Long Island's older homes with wood siding and can cause structural damage if left untreated.

faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Jericho?
faqs.answer: Our ant control services in Jericho range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and type of ant species. This includes inspection, treatment, and a follow-up visit to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: How quickly can you service my Jericho property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Jericho residents. Our team can typically arrive within 24 hours of your call to assess the ant problem and begin treatment immediately.

faqs.question: Are your ant control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and offer eco-friendly treatment options that are safe for your family and pets. Our technicians take extra precautions in homes with children and animals, and we provide clear instructions on any necessary waiting periods before re-entering treated areas.
